metadata.title: Chai Active — Software with life for Jewish communities
metadata.description: Kehál Platform and other custom platforms for Jewish communities and businesses. Barcelona.

headline: Manage everything.
From one place.
banners.description: Powerful tools for members, events, donations, mikvah bookings, communications and analytics. All from one central dashboard.

slides.name: Creative Favours
slides.description: We built a custom e-commerce website for this family-run Judaica business in London, specializing in personalized kippot, benchers, and challah covers for over 10 years. The new site brings their full catalog online with category browsing, customer accounts, and direct WhatsApp ordering.
slides.quote: Our new website finally looks as good as our products. Customers can browse everything and reach us directly — it's made a real difference.

slides.name: Perashapp
slides.description: We built the platform behind Perashapp, a tool for studying the weekly parasha with audio synced word-by-word to the text — including a teacher dashboard and a student experience designed for focused learning.
slides.quote: Perashapp changed how my students engage with the parasha. Following the audio word by word keeps them focused in a way reading alone never did.

slides.name: Jabad Barcelona
slides.description: We built Kehál, the all-in-one community app now used daily by Jabad Barcelona — event sign-ups, mikvah bookings, donations, Torah content, and a business directory, all in one place.
slides.quote: Kehál has become part of how our community runs day to day. What used to take five WhatsApp groups and a spreadsheet now happens in one place.

sobreNosotros.title: More Than an App
sobreNosotros.subhead: We're not just building software. We're building stronger Jewish communities.
paragraphs: Two Jews, two different paths, one shared mission. Same problem, wherever we looked: incredible communities running on outdated tools, scattered WhatsApp groups, and hours of unpaid admin work that technology should handle effortlessly.
So we decided to build it — not another app, but a way to give community leaders their time back. One home for events, memberships, donations, classes, and everything else a kehilá runs on.
For us, this is how we give back. We're starting community by community, because every kehilá we strengthen is a step toward a stronger Jewish future.
sobreNosotros.pullQuote: Because when communities thrive, Judaism thrives.

founders.name: Isaac Ayash
founders.quote: I believe technology should remove obstacles, so community leaders can focus on people.

founders.name: Moshe Acrish
founders.quote: Building technology with purpose, to strengthen Jewish communities around the world.

sobreNosotros.finalLine: This isn't just a startup. It's our contribution to the future of Jewish communities worldwide.

legal.reviewBanner: Working draft. This document must be reviewed by a legal professional and completed with Chai Active's real identification details before going live in production.

paragraphs: In compliance with the information duty set out in article 10 of Spanish Law 34/2002, of 11 July, on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE), the following details are provided: this website, hereinafter the Website (chaiactive.com), is owned by [Isaac Ayash Belilty / Chai Active's legal entity], hereinafter THE OWNER.

sections.heading: Identifying details
paragraphs: Owner: [Isaac Ayash Belilty / Chai Active — legal form pending confirmation]
Tax ID: [pending]
Registered address: Barcelona, Spain [full address pending]
Contact email: jactive@gmail.com [pending replacement with contacto@chaiactive.com]
Activity: design and development of software and digital platforms for Jewish communities and organizations

sections.heading: Purpose
paragraphs: The Website's purpose is to present THE OWNER's services, showcase work delivered for Jewish communities and businesses, and enable contact with prospective clients. Access to the Website is free and does not require prior registration, except for features that may require it in the future.

sections.heading: Terms of use
paragraphs: Users agree to make appropriate use of the Website, in accordance with the law, morality, public order and this Legal Notice, refraining from any use that could impede, damage or impair its normal operation.

sections.heading: Intellectual and industrial property
paragraphs: All content on the Website (text, images, design, logos, and screenshots of applications developed by THE OWNER) is owned by THE OWNER or displayed with the express authorization of its respective owners (client communities and businesses), and is protected under intellectual and industrial property law. Reproduction, distribution or public communication without prior authorization is prohibited.

sections.heading: Limitation of liability
paragraphs: THE OWNER is not liable for damages arising from interference, interruptions, technical failures or disconnections in the Website's operation, nor for the content of third-party websites accessible via links from this Website.

sections.heading: Governing law and jurisdiction
paragraphs: These terms are governed by Spanish law. For any dispute arising from access to or use of the Website, the parties submit to the Courts of Barcelona, unless applicable regulations provide otherwise.

In accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 27 April 2016 (GDPR), and Spanish Organic Law 3/2018, of 5 December, on Personal Data Protection and Digital Rights Guarantee (LOPDGDD), the following information is provided:

sections.heading: Data controller
paragraphs: Identity: [Isaac Ayash Belilty / Chai Active]
Tax ID: [pending]
Registered address: Barcelona, Spain [pending]
Email: jactive@gmail.com [pending replacement with contacto@chaiactive.com]

sections.heading: What data do we collect?
paragraphs: Through the Website's contact form and/or meeting-booking feature, we collect the data users voluntarily provide: name, email address, phone (optional) and the content of the message or inquiry. No sensitive data or ID documents are collected through this corporate website.

sections.heading: For what purpose do we process your data?
paragraphs: To respond to inquiries received through the contact form, manage meeting/demo bookings, and, if the user expressly consents, send commercial communications related to Chai Active's services.

sections.heading: What is the legal basis for processing?
paragraphs: The data subject's consent, given when filling out and submitting the relevant form (art. 6.1.a GDPR).

sections.heading: How long will we keep your data?
paragraphs: Data will be kept for as long as a commercial or mutual-interest relationship exists, and in any case for the legally established periods to address potential liabilities. If there is no response or continued contact, data will be kept for a maximum of [e.g. 24 months] before deletion.

sections.heading: Who will your data be shared with?
paragraphs: Data will not be shared with third parties, except where legally required. We may rely on technology providers acting as data processors (for example: a hosting/deployment provider [Vercel], an email/form management tool, or a scheduling tool [Calendly]), who will process data only under THE OWNER's instructions and with the guarantees required by the GDPR (including, where applicable, international transfer clauses if the provider is outside the European Economic Area).

sections.heading: What are your rights?
paragraphs: Anyone has the right to obtain confirmation as to whether Chai Active is processing personal data concerning them, and in particular has the right to access their personal data, rectify inaccurate data or request its deletion, as well as to request restriction, objection to, or portability of their data, by writing to jactive@gmail.com [or contacto@chaiactive.com] specifying the right they wish to exercise. They also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (www.aepd.es) if they believe processing does not comply with applicable regulations.

sections.heading: Security measures
paragraphs: THE OWNER adopts the technical and organizational measures necessary to guarantee the security of personal data processed and to prevent its alteration, loss, unauthorized processing or access.

sections.heading: What are cookies?
paragraphs: Cookies are small files installed in the user's browser when visiting a website, which allow, among other things, storing and retrieving information about browsing habits or the user's device.

sections.heading: Cookies used on this Website
paragraphs: Technical (necessary) cookies: essential for the Website to function correctly (for example, remembering the selected language). These do not require consent.

Analytics cookies [pending confirmation of whether Google Analytics or another tool will be used]: allow us to measure visitor numbers and analyze how users use the Website, in order to improve the content offered. These require prior user consent.

Third-party cookies [pending confirmation of embedded tools, e.g. Calendly for booking meetings, or a WhatsApp button]: if the Website includes third-party content, those providers may install their own cookies in accordance with their privacy policies.

sections.heading: Managing cookies
paragraphs: On first accessing the Website, a consent banner will be shown where the user can accept all cookies, reject non-essential ones, or configure their preferences. Users can also delete or block cookies at any time through their browser settings.

sections.heading: More information
paragraphs: For any questions about this Cookie Policy, you can write to us at jactive@gmail.com [or contacto@chaiactive.com].
